label: Apex Protocol — Foundation (Phase 1)
summary: Build the strength, explosive power and repeatable technique needed to make every round more effective.
outcomes: Turn foundational strength into faster, cleaner power
Build single-leg control for stable striking and kicking
Practise technical output under structured round fatigue
description:
This foundation phase builds the strength and explosive power that support sharper, more repeatable rounds—without replacing your fight practice.

Each training day moves from mobility into strength and explosive pairings, followed by bag work and a cooldown. Keep strength work around RPE 8: challenging and controlled, without grinding.

Build consistency and clean technique here before progressing to the heavier second phase.

days.label: Day 1 — Lower Body: Squat & Vertical Power
days.focus: Squat strength, hip-hinge, vertical power, hip mobility/rehab priority

items.name: 90/90 Hip Internal/External Rotation
items.cue: Breathe into the position, find end range.

items.name: Supine Figure-4 Piriformis
items.cue: Cross ankle over knee, flex foot, gentle pressure.

items.name: Half-Kneeling Hip Flexor + PPT
items.cue: Squeeze glute, tuck pelvis — actively stretch the psoas.

items.name: Barbell Back Squat

pair.name: Box Jump
pair.note: Full reset between reps. Land soft.

items.cue: Controlled 3s descent, drive through heels, full depth.

items.name: Romanian Deadlift
items.cue: Neutral spine, hip hinge, bar close, stretch at the bottom.

items.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
items.cue: Drive hips to ceiling, squeeze hard at top, 2s hold — reciprocal-inhibition work to release the hip flexor.

items.name: Jab-Cross Foundation
items.cue: Stay loose. Snap the jab, rotate the hip into the cross.

items.name: Pigeon Pose (Deep)
items.cue: Breathe deep, melt into the floor — this is your most important stretch.

items.name: Couch Stretch (Psoas/Quad)
items.cue: Posterior pelvic tilt throughout — actively stretch the psoas.

items.name: Butterfly Adductor Stretch
items.cue: Elbows press knees gently, lean chest toward feet.

items.name: QL Side Bend (Standing)
items.cue: Arm overhead, reach across — thoracic side flexion.

days.label: Day 3 — Upper Body Push: Incline Strength & Rotational Power
days.focus: Incline pressing, dip strength, rotational (landmine) power

items.name: Thoracic Rotation with Band
items.cue: Anchor band, rotate fully, hold 1s at end range.

items.name: World's Greatest Stretch
items.cue: Lunge + elbow to floor + thoracic rotation in one fluid move.

items.name: Active Hip Flexor Reach
items.note: Stretch hip flexor while reaching overhead
items.cue: Half-kneeling, reach opposite arm overhead and laterally.

items.name: Incline Barbell Press
items.cue: Controlled down, explosive up — this is PAP prep.

items.name: Weighted Dip
items.cue: Full ROM — chest-to-bar depth, explosive press.

items.name: Landmine Press (Rotational)
items.cue: Press from the shoulder — this mirrors your cross movement, feel the rotation.

items.name: Cross-Hook-Cross Power
items.cue: RIGHT hand power focus every session — rotate the hip INTO the cross.

items.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
items.cue: Find the tightest angle and stay there.

items.name: Shoulder Cross-Body Rear Delt
items.cue: Arm across chest, opposite hand pulls at the elbow.

items.name: Thread-the-Needle T-Spine
items.cue: On all fours, thread arm under body, hold at deepest point.

items.name: Doorway Hip Flexor Lunge
items.note: RIGHT side priority — desk posture fix
items.cue: Posterior pelvic tilt throughout the stretch.

days.label: Day 5 — Lower Body: Hinge, Unilateral & Kick Power
days.focus: Single-leg strength, adductor/kick-strength work, hip rehab priority

items.name: Cossack Squat
items.cue: Slow descent, feel the inner thigh — this IS hip rehab.

items.name: Band Hip Abduction Standing
items.cue: Slow and controlled — glute-med activation.

items.name: Adductor Stretch + Knee Drive
items.cue: Wide stance, shift weight side to side.

items.name: Hip Flexion + External Rotation
items.cue: Seated — lift knee, rotate externally, hold at end range.

items.name: Supine Hip CARs
items.cue: Controlled Articular Rotation — maximum range, no compensation.

items.name: Bulgarian Split Squat

prescription.note: Bodyweight to start; add load once form is perfect

items.cue: RIGHT leg forward first — this exposes the imbalance. Control the descent.

items.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
items.cue: Hinge from the hip, opposite arm hangs — balance is the point.

items.name: Copenhagen Plank

prescription.note: THIS IS YOUR KICK STRENGTH EXERCISE

items.cue: Top leg on bench — the adductor holds you up. Critical for kick power.

items.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
items.cue: Drive through the heel, max glute contraction — forces the psoas to relax via reciprocal inhibition.

items.name: Roundhouse Kick Setup
perRound: R1-2: Jab-Cross + Kick SETUP (no kick yet)
items.cue: Plant the foot fully, drive the hip through. Power comes from hip rotation.

items.name: Pigeon Pose EXTENDED
items.cue: Longest hold of the week — this is where the hip heals.

items.name: Prone Hip Extension
items.note: Feel glute activate — reciprocal inhibition at rest
items.cue: Squeeze glute, lift leg 5cm, hold. Psoas releases.

items.name: Child's Pose + Hip Shift
items.cue: Walk hands to one corner, feel the QL and hip flexor.

items.name: Side-Lying Hip Abduction Hold
items.cue: Top leg lifted 30cm, hold. Feel the inner thigh/groin.

items.name: Supine Spinal Twist
items.cue: Arms out wide — let gravity rotate the spine.

days.label: Day 6 — Upper Body Pull & Rotational Power
days.focus: Vertical + horizontal pulling, rotational pull power, defence/counter bag work

items.name: Band Pull-Apart
items.cue: Slow and controlled. Hold the retraction 1s at the back.

items.name: Scapular Wall Slides
items.note: Maintain contact with the wall throughout
items.cue: Elbows and wrists stay on the wall — full Y-W-T-L pattern.

items.name: T-Spine Extension over Foam Roller
items.cue: Arms across chest, extend over the roller at different levels.

items.name: Weighted Pull-up

prescription.note: Phase 1 load; tested max is +35kg — plenty of headroom this phase

pair.name: Explosive Pull-up (BW)
pair.note: Max speed — like pulling yourself out of danger.

items.cue: Controlled 3s descent, full hang, chest to bar.

items.name: Chest-Supported Row
items.cue: Retract scapula first, then pull — 3s controlled eccentric, no momentum.

items.name: Landmine Row + Rotation
items.cue: Hip drive into the pull — trains the rotational pulling chain, your clinch strength.

items.name: Cable High-to-Low Woodchop
items.cue: Full rotation, belt to opposite knee — this generates rotational knockout power. Own every rep.

items.name: Defence + Counter
perRound: R5: Full Defence into Power Counter
items.cue: Move your head FIRST. The counter is earned by the defence.

items.name: Lat/Serratus Band Stretch
items.note: Full overhead lat stretch with band
items.cue: Anchor band low, grip overhead, shift hips away.

items.name: Overhead Tricep Stretch
items.cue: Gently pull the elbow further back with the opposite hand.

items.name: Doorway Hip Flexor
items.cue: Posterior pelvic tilt — psoas stretch.

items.name: Wrist + Forearm Flexor
items.cue: Protect the wrists after bag work.
